positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical composition of mystic flora and celestial elements, designed for apparel printing. Featured elements include stylized bioluminescent vines, glowing geometric mandalas, floating crescent moons, and oversized tropical leaves forming a central, cohesive wreath. The style should be neo-tribal, detailed vector art mixed with intricate zentangle patterns. Utilize a limited, rich color palette (deep indigo, teal, gold accents) against a single background layer for maximum contrast and punch. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes and clear linework, optimized for screen printing or DTG application. Minimalist yet ornate. Rule of thirds applied to the arrangement of elements, ensuring a central focal point. High contrast, graphic novel quality, symmetry, 8K, vector illustration.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, noisy, jpeg artifacts, poor composition, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, solid block color, realistic photography
